PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENITEZ, CARLOS LAS, FELISICIMO BENITEZ, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALVADOR, EDUARDO A $4,790.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,790.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR: TO PLAINTIFF CARLOS BENITEZ: $2400.00 TO PLAINTIFF ROBERT BENITEZ: $ 590.00 TO PLAINTIFF FELISICIMO LAS: $1800.00 EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT
